  "findings": [
    "The staged joist hangers do not match the specified joist size, violating manufacturer specifications and structural load requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged hangers and procure the correct Simpson Strong-Tie hanger models specified for the actual joist dimensions before installation begins."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using an undersized or oversized hanger for a joist reduces the load-carrying capacity of the connection, violates manufacturer installation instructions, and fails to comply with IRC prescriptive framing requirements.",
